archetype.name: Eagle Knight
archetype.note: This archetype offers Tactical Reflexes at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Tactical Reflexes
feat.text: You are particularly swift at punishing foes who leave you openings. At the start of each of your turns when you regain your actions, you gain an additional reaction that can be used only to make a Reactive Strike.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
